caption: A woman with black hair and glasses is speaking against a solid dark gray background. She is wearing a light green tunic with a detailed red and white embroidered neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. Throughout the sequence, she is gesturing with both hands to emphasize her points; her hands move from her chest outward toward her sides. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". The woman remains centered in the frame, maintaining a consistent posture while her facial expressions and hand movements shift slightly as she continues to speak.
